pr.title: Record: DeepQuant V10b — 11L INT6 + 8ep LoRA TTT (val_bpb=0.6430)

output.summary: DeepQuant pairs an 11L INT6 transformer with 8-epoch cosine LoRA+bias test-time training, temp rescaling, and fallback policies per document.
techniques: 8-epoch cosine-scheduled LoRA and per-block bias tuning during test-time training
LM-head rank-16 LoRA with temperature rescale plus base-model fallback for long docs
INT6-quantized 11-layer backbone with Muon+AdamW mix and U-Net skips
